Office Assistant & Bookkeeper • Track and record deposited checks and sale transaction revenue using the POS system and business’ financial banking account. • Prepare monthly billing invoices for client personal expenses. • Handle cash transactions for personal and business accounts, including MoneyGram. • Calculate and document payroll taxes, wages, and prepare reports using Quickbooks and 21st Century Accounting. • Receive and respond to calls from customers requiring assistance with business-related inquiries and issues.
